title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIWAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA-APAYAO, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 299 / 67 OG No. 35, 6866 (August 30, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6183, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIWAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA-APAYAO, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Liwan in the Province of Kalinga-Apayao is changed to the Municipality of Rizal.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
